title: Undefeatables
description: Adds mini-bosses to your minecraft experience.
body:
**![](https://i.imgur.com/Nh8pfHv.png)**

**What is Undefeatables?**

It's a mod that introduces mini-bosses.

**Features**

Variants of Mini-Bosses:

\- Mobs naturally have a 1/250 chance to become **Undefeatables**.  
\- Powers granted to them come in tiers, ranging from weakest (**I**) to strongest (**IV**).  
\- Undefeatables have the following tier probabilities: I: 60%, II: 24%, III: 11.2%, IV: 4.8%.

\- Undefeatables have their health increased based on their respective tier, +150 for each tier (**configurable**).

\- The armor and armor toughness of Undefeatables are increased based on their tier, with 7.5 and 5, respectively, for each tier (**configurable**).  
\- Undefeatables gain increased speed based on their tier, with a +15% boost for each tier.  
\- Undefeatables deal increased attack damage based on their tier, +3.5 for each tier (**configurable**).

![](https://i.imgur.com/3DnwoI6.png)

Mini-boss Drops:

\- Tier **I** drops consist of **Iron** equipment.

\- Tier **II** drops consist of **Iron** to **Diamond** equipment.

\- Tier **III** drops consist of **Diamond** equipment.

\- Tier **IV** drops comprise **Diamond**, **Netherrite**, and **Enderium** equipment.

It supports **Enderium in the End**, so if installed you should be able to drop **Enderium** equipment.

Adding custom item drops:

Go to \\config\\undefeatables\\customdrops and modify anything as you want. I highly suggest at least leaving one inactive, by default, I set the chance to 0.

![](https://i.imgur.com/fLqyKv1.png)

There is no restriction on the quantity of items you can add, and you have the flexibility to select items from any mod according to your preference.

"modId:itemName:minAmount-maxAmount:chance-chanceIn" is the template for entries. dropChance = chance/chanceIn

Adding blacklisted mobs:

You can blacklist mobs in config\\undefeatables\\blacklist.

![](https://i.imgur.com/u0mCvpJ.png)

**Other**

You can use this mod in your modpacks freely.

STOP REPOSTING, I DON'T ALLOW MY MOD TO BE REUPLOADED ON ANYWHERE ELSE FOR NO REASON.
